rationale_source: R5-C-a admin-sig leak prevention: broker-facing outbound MUST NOT contain Vienna internal admin signatures, mock-data markers, or test-fixture artifacts

must_not_include.rationale: F4.SL: mock-data markers must not leak to broker-facing outbound.
F4.SL: test-fixture artifacts must not leak (anti-fab discipline).
F4.SL: internal sig templates must not appear as broker-facing content.
